body: Dev, thanks for sending over the updated deck — I went through it this morning and I think the progress you've made on the demand-side partnerships is genuinely impressive. The [GreenPulse](greenpulse.io) story is shaping up in a way that feels much more defensible than when we first spoke in October. I do want to spend more time stress-testing the grid interconnection assumptions in the unit economics before we move to a partner meeting, so I'd love to set up a working session with your technical lead if that's possible. Can you share availability for sometime the week of January 20th? In the meantime, I'll loop in my colleague at [Halfway Capital](halfway.vc) who covers energy infrastructure market maps — she may have useful context on a few of the regional players you're targeting.
